title: Wiki Page Frontmatter (v1)
description: v1 canonical schema for .wiki/concepts/*.md frontmatter. Enforced by lib/service/schema.py. Any divergence between this JSON schema and the frozen dataclass in lib/domain/types.py is a bug — both must be updated together. Legacy v0 articles (type: 'wiki', no schema_version) must be migrated via lib/service/migrations/v0_to_v1.py before they are loadable under this schema.

schema_version.description: Wiki schema version. v1 is the initial schema introduced by the Source-Agnostic Knowledge Pipeline (docs/plans/20260408163658).

article_id.description: Immutable article identity. Format YYYYMMDDHHMMSS-{slug}; on collision, append -2, -3, ... Allocated by lib/service/wiki_repo.py atomically.

article_type.description: View / required-field-set selector. Mutable — article_id is the only stable identity.

captured_at.description: Date the article was captured into the wiki (YYYY-MM-DD). Stable across re-compiles; does not move with content edits.

valid_from.description: Start of validity period (ISO date). null means 'unknown start'.

valid_to.description: End of validity period. null means 'still current, no known end'. Expired articles move to status=historical with relations.superseded_by set.

status.description: Single-source status model. No 'conflicted' (validator writes 'disputed'); no 'draft' (info-poor articles use 'unverified').

source_version.description: Monotonic version number; Fetcher increments on content change.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of the source content, prefixed with 'sha256:'.

fetched_at.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp when the source was fetched.

revision.description: VCS revision (e.g. git commit hash) the source content was captured at. Populated by repo-aware fetchers; maps from raw frontmatter 'source_revision' (references/frontmatter-schemas.md). Null/absent for non-VCS sources.

sources.description: Upstream sources contributing evidence to this article. Must not be empty for compiled articles; empty sources is allowed only for stub articles (status=unverified).

claims.description: Atomic facts extracted from sources. Written by Phase 3 compiler (lib/domain/compiler/claim_extractor.py). Empty is allowed (Phase 0 stubs start empty).

claim_refs.description: References to claims owned by other articles. Phase 3 writes these; Phase 4 validator uses them for cross-article consistency.

tool.description: Name of the tool that wrote this representation: wiki-compile, wiki-migrate, wiki-repo-stub, ...

version.description: Tool logic version; bump on breaking rendering changes.

generated_at.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp when this representation was generated.

generated_by.description: Audit-light provenance. Review audit trails live under extensions.review.audit — never under generated_by.

extensions.description: Namespaced extensions. Reserved namespaces: extensions.review.audit (written by review.py). Other namespaces are owned by their respective tools and must be strictly namespaced to avoid collisions.

tags.description: Search-oriented tags. Lowercase, hyphen-separated convention; validated in lint-wiki.
